content: # Centennial Empire Global - Official Website **Official landing page and brand hub for Centennial Empire Global.** рџЊђ **Live Site:** [centennial-empire.github.io](https://centennial-empire.github.io) рџ“Љ **Mission:** Revolutionizing rural India through advanced robotics and digital infrastructure рџљЂ **Key Project:** [Sipahi R1 Robotics](https://ceg-command.emergent.host/) --- ## рџ“‚ Repository Structure ``` . в”њв”Ђв”Ђ index.html # Main landing page в”њв”Ђв”Ђ assets/ # Images, icons, and media в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ images/ в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ icons/ в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ videos/ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ pages/ # Additional website pages в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ about.html в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ projects.html в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ team.html в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ contact.html в”њв”Ђв”Ђ css/ # Stylesheets (if not using CDN) в”њв”Ђв”Ђ js/ # JavaScript functionality в”њв”Ђв”Ђ docs/ # Documentation в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ BRAND.md # Brand guidelines в”‚ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ CONTRIBUTING.md # Contribution guidelines в”‚ в””в”Ђв”Ђ DEPLOYMENT.md # Deployment instructions в”њв”Ђв”Ђ linkedin_posts.md # Social media templates в””в”Ђв”Ђ .github/ # GitHub automation в””в”Ђв”Ђ workflows/ # CI/CD pipelines ``` --- ## рџЋЁ Design System - **Framework:** Tailwind CSS (v3+) - **Color Scheme:** - Primary: Google Blue (#4285f4) - Accent: Light Blue (#8ab4f8) - Dark Mode: #0f0f0f background - **Typography:** Google Sans / Inter - **Design Pattern:** Modern glassmorphism + dark theme --- ## рџљЂ Getting Started ### Local Development ```bash # 1. Clone the repository git clone https://github.com/Centennial-Empire-Global/centennial-empire.github.io.git cd centennial-empire.github.io # 2. Open in your browser open index.html # or use a local server python -m http.server 8000 # Visit: http://localhost:8000 ``` ### Making Changes 1. Edit HTML files directly or use a web editor 2. Preview changes locally 3. Commit and push to main branch 4. GitHub Pages automatically deploys --- ## рџ“‹ Site Pages & Purpose | Page | Purpose | Status | |------|---------|--------| | `index.html` | Hero + Mission + Projects | вњ… Live | | `about.html` | Team, Vision, History | рџ“ќ To Create | | `projects.html` | Sipahi R1, Key Initiatives | рџ“ќ To Create | | `contact.html` | Contact forms, Social links | рџ“ќ To Create | | `team.html` | Team profiles | рџ“ќ To Create | --- ## рџ”§ Customization ### Update Site Title & Meta Edit `index.html` head section: ```html Your Title ``` ### Update Colors Modify the Tailwind config in `index.html`: ```javascript colors: { omega: { bg: '#0f0f0f', // Background accent: '#8ab4f8', // Primary accent // ... } } ``` ### Add/Update Images Place images in `assets/images/` and reference: ```html ``` --- ## рџ“± Performance Checklist - [ ] Images optimized (compress to <500KB each) - [ ] Mobile responsive tested - [ ] Page load time <3 seconds - [ ] SEO meta tags added - [ ] Open Graph tags for social sharing - [ ] Analytics configured (Google Analytics / Plausible) - [ ] Contact form working - [ ] 404 page configured --- ## рџ”„ Deployment **Automatic:** Changes to `main` branch auto-deploy to GitHub Pages. **Manual Force Refresh:** ```bash git add . git commit -m "Update: [description]" git push origin main ``` Wait 1-2 minutes for GitHub Pages to rebuild. --- ## рџ“ћ Support & Contact - **GitHub Issues:** [Report bugs](https://github.com/Centennial-Empire-Global/centennial-empire.github.io/issues) - **Command Center:** [ceg-command.emergent.host](https://ceg-command.emergent.host/) - **Social:** [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/company/centennial-empire-global) --- ## рџ“„ License Private repository. Unauthorized use prohibited. **Last Updated:** July 5, 2026
message: docs: Add comprehensive README with structure, guidelines, and deployment info
